page_content:
First and second semester.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. AGRO798, HORT798, NRSC798, or PLSC798. Formerly: NRSC798.

PLSC799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

PLSC802 Epidemiology and Plant Disease Management (3 Credits) An in-depth advanced course for graduate students in plant pathology, agronomy, entomology and horticulture emphasizing the principles of effective plant disease management in the agroecosystem.
